title: Ollama discovery probe targets compose DNS, not the env-wired host seam (self-hosted false unreachable)
blockedReason: In-repo fix + hermetic contract test are COMPLETE and green this session: 3/3 cmd/core discovery tests PASS (incl. the adversarial env-seam-vs-registry-param case), the internal/config SST hardcoded-Ollama guard stays green (3/3 PASS), and full-repo `go test ./...` compiles with the dead-helper removal (UNIT_EXIT=0 / GUARD_EXIT=0). The ONE remaining item — live self-hosted re-verification that `GET /v1/agent/model` reports local-ollama reachable — requires a rebuild + redeploy at the fix's source SHA through the knb smackerel/home-lab adapter (8 pre-apply verifications, no bypass), because the fix changes the source SHA. That redeploy is BLOCKED on: (1) the same self-hosted handoff that gates the 084/087/088/096 cohort, AND (2) a stable <deploy-host> with good-neighbor rebuild headroom (at capture time the host was memory-oversubscribed by concurrent FOREIGN product load and the smackerel ML sidecar had just been OOM-killed; a rebuild that evicts foreign work is forbidden). ACTIONABLE NEXT STEP (bubbles.devops): on a stable self-hosted host with headroom, build smackerel-core at the fix SHA, apply via the knb adapter, then probe `GET /v1/agent/model` and confirm local-ollama's ProviderDiscoveryStatus is reachable (not unreachable) with its live-discovered models present in the unified catalog.

executionHistory.outcome: Re-verified the self-hosted discovery-leg gap: the SCOPE-04 Ollama discovery adapter built its base URL from the local-ollama registry base_url param (compose-service DNS name in the build-once bundle) while /health + synthesis use the env-wired cfg.OllamaURL seam that knb re-points to the host daemon; on the single-host topology the compose-DNS probe is NXDOMAIN => false local-ollama unreachable.

Added ollamaDiscoveryBaseURL(cfg) (trimmed cfg.OllamaURL, fail-loud on empty, no compose-DNS default); routed the Ollama discovery adapter through it in wireSpec096DiscoveryAndDispatch; removed the now-dead ollamaConnectionBaseURL; reworded the fix doc comment so the internal/config SST hardcoded-Ollama guard stays green.

Added cmd/core/wiring_ollama_discovery_baseurl_test.go (3 cases incl. adversarial env-seam-vs-registry-param). ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run OllamaDiscoveryBaseURL => 3/3 PASS, cmd/core ok, UNIT_EXIT=0. SST guard re-run => 3/3 PASS, internal/config ok, GUARD_EXIT=0. Broader open-knowledge/spec-096/model-connection/discovery/dispatch selector => finished OK, REGRESSION_EXIT=0.

certification.note: In-repo fix + hermetic test complete and green; certification withheld pending the live self-hosted redeploy-verify (see blockedReason).

policySnapshot.boundary: cmd/core/wiring_assistant_openknowledge.go (Ollama discovery adapter base-URL seam), cmd/core/wiring_ollama_discovery_baseurl_test.go, and this bug folder under specs/096-multi-provider-model-connections/bugs/BUG-096-001-discovery-probe-compose-dns/
forbidden: config/smackerel.yaml, the config generator, or the knb bundle/params (the env-wired OLLAMA_URL seam is already correctly provisioned; the defect was purely which cfg field discovery consumed)
the /ask synthesis dispatch, provider-aware dispatch resolver, 088/089 switch precedence, per-user store, or credential/secret handling
any real host / IP / secret literal in the smackerel repo (generic-only; concrete host IP lives in the knb adapter)
